name: Jalapeno Poppers
recipeIngredient: jalapenos, cut in half and seeds removed
cream cheese, enough to fill each pepper half
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the jalapenos in half and remove the seeds.
2. Fill each pepper half with cream cheese.
3. Dip the peppers into egg, then coat with bread crumbs.
4. Freeze the coated peppers for about 20 minutes to set the bread crumbs.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake the jalapeno poppers until golden brown and crispy.
